properties.name: Western Solar Dominance Zone
properties.source: CEA state generation report + RVUNL / RREC
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. Refer to the cited source for the authoritative surveyed line.

facts: Thar-desert insolation of >2000 kWh/m²/year — among the highest in India.
Bhadla Solar Park at 2245 MW is the largest single-site solar park in the world.
Land-availability + insolation + low humidity make the western belt the country's renewable heartland.

properties.headline: Bhadla + Fatehgarh + Nokh solar parks — the heart of Rajasthan's solar leadership.
properties.installed: ~15 GW of the state's 20 GW solar fleet

properties.name: Hadoti Base-Load Zone
properties.source: CEA state generation report + RVUNL / RREC
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. Refer to the cited source for the authoritative surveyed line.

facts: Anchored on Chambal river water and the Chhabra-Kalisindh coal cluster.
RAPS 1-6 (Rajasthan Atomic Power Station) at 1180 MW is one of India's oldest nuclear complexes, and its largest PHWR (pressurised heavy water reactor) site by unit count.
RAPS 7-8 (700 MW × 2 PHWRs) are under construction, taking Rawatbhata past 2.5 GW nuclear capacity.

properties.headline: Rawatbhata (RAPS 1-6) + Kota Super Thermal + Chhabra + Kalisindh — the state's base-load fleet.

properties.name: Jaisalmer-Barmer Wind + Solar Hybrid Zone
properties.source: CEA state generation report + RVUNL / RREC
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. Refer to the cited source for the authoritative surveyed line.

facts: Wind resource classified as "excellent" (>200 W/m² at 80 m hub height).
Suzlon, Vestas, Adani, ReNew, Vedanta — every major renewables developer operates here.
Wind + solar hybrid park policy (MNRE 2018) has pushed co-located capacity to industry-defining scale in Jaisalmer.

properties.headline: India's densest wind belt — >5 GW installed, now paired with co-located solar.

properties.name: Northern Gas + Solar Zone
properties.source: CEA state generation report + RVUNL / RREC
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. Refer to the cited source for the authoritative surveyed line.

facts: Ramgarh Gas TPS (Jaisalmer) uses Cairn's Raageshwari and Barmer basin gas.
IGNP command farmers have adopted solar-pump replacement under KUSUM.

properties.headline: Anta and Ramgarh gas-turbine stations + IGNP-command solar rooftop in the north-canal belt.

properties.name: Southern Hydel Zone
properties.source: CEA state generation report + RVUNL / RREC
properties.geometryNote: Boundary is the union of the constituent districts. Refer to the cited source for the authoritative surveyed line.

facts: Every major dam commissioned across the Chambal cascade includes a hydro-electric station.
Mahi Bajaj Sagar HEP (140 MW) serves the tribal-belt districts of the south.
Small-hydro pockets on the Bassi and Meja dams supplement the mix.

properties.headline: Mahi Bajaj Sagar + Rana Pratap Sagar + Jawahar Sagar — the state's hydel fleet.
